strategy_summary: The binary is a 32-bit ELF with partial RELRO, no canary, and NX enabled. The main function reads input into a buffer and prints it out, which suggests a format string vulnerability. We can use the format string to overwrite the GOT entry of 'printf' with the address of 'backdoor'. This will cause the next call to 'printf' to jump to 'backdoor', which calls 'system("/bin/sh");'.
